cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to work through this question. The user provided a passage about a supermarket and then a specific question about three jars of low-fat milk. The key point here is that all three jars have the same amount of fat. The text explicitly states, "As you can see, all the milk has the same amount of fat. The milk is all the same." The question is about these three jars of milk and which statement is correct regarding their fat content and pricing. The question asks: "There are three different jars of low fat milk, and _ ." The options are (A) one has more fat than the other two, (B) they all cost the same amount of money, (C) one has less fat than the others, (D) they all have the same amount of fat. Looking back at the passage, the text clearly states that "all the milk has the same amount of fat." So, this directly points to option (D).
